text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japan Cup. Agnes Tachyon isn't
with us anymore, but the two of us have still made
it this far.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Special Week and Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: They both have their own unique traits...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's power comes from the sheer
volume of food she eats...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, my diet swings between
extremes... There's no doubt about it... that
power is unique to her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And Silence Suzuka hides her extraordinary
intensity. An intensity I don't have...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Her speed and skill as a front runner... is just
what's on the surface... The true source of her
strength is hidden deep down...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So what about Zenno Rob Roy? She's my
competition today.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I wonder what power she's hiding...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh... My greatest strength?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes... Would you be willing to tell me?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
W-well, none of my traits spring immediately to
mind, but if I had to say...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Perhaps it would be my unbreakable spirit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: As in, your determination?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Races don't always take place when I'm
feeling my very best. Sometimes, it's the
opposite.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I could never hope to be a hero by just giving
up. So, in every single race, I aim for the best
possible position.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I strive to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I see... So that's how Zenno Rob Roy does it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This must be... the final piece...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... Cafe? Are you perhaps trying to learn from
me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Learn from you... No, I don't think that's quite it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think... there's probably an unbreakable spirit
inside me. But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I've forgotten it... If I could just remember it—that
feeling deep inside...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the while she's been chasing after her friend,
Manhattan Cafe has been piecing things
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she might just find the final piece she needs
at this Japan Cup.
